    private static String join(final Iterable<String> strings, final String sep) {
        final StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        final Iterator<String> si = strings.iterator();
        if (si.hasNext()) {
            sb.append(si.next());

        while (si.hasNext()) {
            sb.append(sep).append(si.next());
        }
